content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Attached please find the business update for SCS, Lovito, and warehouse for
our discussion tomorrow. Thank you!

Best,
Jinyu

content.question:
Thanks.



Slide 6

   - In future, lets just keep Shop P&L (after VAT) line?

Not sure
   meaningful to have the before VAT line anymore
   - If we look at after returning SLS profits, why did it get worse from
   June to July?

Slide 8 - 9

   - Just to be clear, it will not be an option for us to lose money at all
   - Amidst all the platform hikes + govt taxes, CB sellers penetration has
   at least maintained, so it is around adaptability
   - From a cost point of view, are we taking on the cost for the entire
   WH?
Or just what we use?

Slide 10

   - #2  > What does COGS down and lowered fulfilment here mean?

Slide 12

   - Can explain on what this means exactly?

Not clear to me



Slide 13

   - Will we be further reducing WH manpower?

What is the exact impact
   there?

Slide 14

   - I think we need to grow faster on our ST assortment. Out of all ADI >2
   SPU, how many/% do we actually have in our store right now?

What is the
   blocker around increasing it right now?

- In terms of COGS, what other levers do we have to continue to
   negotiate better?
- Have we started any conversation with Tao sellers yet?

Especially
   those who do not wish to set up shop with us?
- For JIT mode, how does our COGS + competitiveness look like?

Slide 16

   - What is our ADO split between short and long tail right now?
- I think even for short tail, we may have to lose money for some?

And
   make money from others?
Right now, we insist to make money from all SKUs?

Slide 17

   - For JIT, I remember we were trying to find out how sellers are able to
   do it much faster than us?

Slide 18 - 19

   - Can go through this, not quite sure what it means
   - Slide 19 >> Why is NFR so high here?
Especially for PH?

Slide 24

   - So it is better to be cheaper as compared to investing in ads?
